body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-21726", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "The CVE-2021-36156 fix validates the namespace parameter for path traversal sequences after a single URL decode, by double encoding, an attacker can read files at the Ruler API endpoint /loki/api/v1/rules/{namespace}\n\nThanks to Prasanth Sundararajan for reporting this vulnerability.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00409, "percentile": 0.32555}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-497x-rrr9-68jp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T21:42:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-497x-rrr9-68jp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-497x-rrr9-68jp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-21726"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-15T20:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-04-15T21:30:18Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-21726", "https://grafana.com/security/security-advisories/cve-2026-21726", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-497x-rrr9-68jp"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/grafana/loki", "summary": "Grafana Loki Path Traversal - CVE-2021-36156 Bypass", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T16:38:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-497x-rrr9-68jp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.6.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/grafana/loki/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.6.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
